word: G4910 - συνευωχέω - syneuōchéō - soon-yoo-o-kheh'-o - Feast with

sections.paragraph: இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Verb / வினைச்சொல்

ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From G4862 and a derivative of a presumed compound of G2095 and a derivative of G2192 (meaning to be in good condition, that is, [by implication] to fare well, or feast); to entertain sumptuously in company with, that is, (middle or passive voice) to revel together: - feast with.
